0.text: Centriacinar nodules forming a tree-in-bud appearance in the lower lobe of the left lung

1.text: Linear subsegmental atelectasis in the posterobasal and mediobasal segments of the right lower lobe

2.text: Minimal bronchiectatic changes in the posterobasal and mediobasal segments of the right lower lobe

3.text: Centriacinar nodules forming a tree-in-bud appearance in the surrounding area

4.text: Minimal ground-glass opacities in the surrounding area
